message.content:
@startuml
actor Customer
participant "TripFinder" as TripFinder
participant "Trip" as Trip
participant "Bicycle" as Bicycle

Customer -> TripFinder: suitable_trips(\non_date,\ndifficulty,\nneed_bike)
activate TripFinder
TripFinder -> Trip: suitable_trips(\non_date,\non_difficulty)
activate Trip
Trip --> TripFinder
deactivate Trip
note over TripFinder: for each trips
TripFinder -> Bicycle: suitable_bicycle(\ntrip_date,\nroute_type)
activate Bicycle
Bicycle --> TripFinder
deactivate Bicycle
TripFinder --> Customer: result
deactivate TripFinder
@enduml
